name: Chestnut Grove Park
description: Chestnut Grove Park is a place to play pickleball in Keedysville, MD. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court cannot be reserved. Players have access to restrooms and water. The court is free.
hours: Monday-Friday, 7:30 a.m. – 4:30 p.m. TTY users may call any government office through the Maryland Relay Service 1-800-735-2258 Americans with Disabilities Act Information

name: Clear Spring Park
description: Clear Spring Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clear Spring, MD. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. You can’t reserve the court. The court is free.
hours: Monday-Friday, 7:30 a.m. – 4:30 p.m. TTY users may call any government office through the Maryland Relay Service 1-800-735-2258 Americans with Disabilities Act Information

name: Fort Ritchie Community Center
description: Fort Ritchie Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Fort Ritchie, MD. There are 3 courts. 1 is outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
hours: Easter: Closed – Sunday, April 5 Memorial Day: Closed – Monday, May 25 Independence Day: Closed, – Saturday, July 4 Labor Day: Closed – Monday, September 7 Thanksgiving Day: Closed – Thursday, November 26 Christmas Eve: Open 5:30 am – 12 pm, Thursday, December 24 Christmas Day: Closed – Friday, December 25 New Year’s Eve: Open 5:30 am – 12 pm, Thursday, December 31 New Year’s Day: Closed – Friday, January 1 © Copyright 2024 Fort Ritchie Community Center

name: Hagerstown Field House
description: Hagerstown Field House is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hagerstown, MD. There are 6 indoor hard and wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Hagerstown YMCA
description: Hagerstown YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hagerstown, MD. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Marty Snook Park
description: Marty Snook Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hagerstown, MD. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
hours: Monday-Friday, 7:30 a.m. – 4:30 p.m. TTY users may call any government office through the Maryland Relay Service 1-800-735-2258 Americans with Disabilities Act Information

name: Pangborn Park
description: Pangborn Park is a place to play pickleball in Hagerstown, MD. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Pleasant Valley Park
description: Pleasant Valley Park is a place to play pickleball in Rohrersville, MD. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The court is free. You can’t reserve the court.

name: Springfield Middle School Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Springfield Middle School Courts in Williamsport, MD! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Washington County Regional Park
description: Come play pickleball at Washington County Regional Park in Hagerstown, MD! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
hours: Monday-Friday, 7:30 a.m. – 4:30 p.m. TTY users may call any government office through the Maryland Relay Service 1-800-735-2258 Americans with Disabilities Act Information
